content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/state.py", "summary": "This file defines a shared state object used in the StoryForge LangGraph pipeline, which contains various attributes related to project metadata, pipeline data, clarification needs, generation output, control flow, ADO results, document export results, and errors. It also includes a function for initializing this state with default values.", "rules": [{"name": "Initialize State", "description": "Create an initial state object for a new assessment job in the StoryForge LangGraph pipeline.", "conditions": ["job_id is provided"], "actions": ["Set project metadata, initialize pipeline data and control flow attributes, set status to 'analyzing'"]}], "dependencies": []}
